PathOfBuilding.Notes:
---------------------------------------------- Kankar's Ward Stacker Cobra Lash Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xLDXJjJW8kw
----------------------------------------------
you can use claws or daggers till you get the claw passives (lvl32), then use only claws. if you are Trickster, ^x7070FFFlame wall^7 will give some added fire damage for early game. ^xE05030Shield Charge ^7is another option if you don't like ^x70FF70Whirling Blades^7. ^7 Normal Lab: Gathering Winds Cruel Lab: Ricochet Merciless Lab: Endless Munitions
ACT 1 ^x70FF70Cobra Lash^7 + ^x70FF70Added Cold^7 + ^x3F6DB3^x7070FFAdded Lightning^7^7/^x70FF70Faster Attacks^7 (depending on your socket colours) ^x70FF70^x3F6DB3^x7070FFFrostblink ^x7070FF^x70FF70Sniper's Mark^7 ^x70FF70Whirling Blades^7 + ^x70FF70Faster Attacks^7 if you have available socket, use this for extra movement speed
ACT 2 ^x70FF70Cobra Lash^7 + ^x70FF70Added Cold^7 + ^x7070FFTrinity^7 ^x70FF70^x3F6DB3^x7070FFFrostblink ^x7070FF^x70FF70Sniper's Mark^7 ^x70FF70Whirling Blades^7 + ^x70FF70Faster Attacks^7 + ^x70FF70Momentum^7 ^x70FF70Blood Rage Herald of Ice^7 ^x70FF70Precision^7
Make sure that you always have more accuracy than you maximum life for ^xADAA47^xAF6025^xFFFF77Precise Technique^7^7.^7 Also make sure that your Trinity buff is maxed on top left, if it's not, ^xADAA47Lightning Damage^7 craft should fix it. On Lunaris Temple Level 2, get the crafting recipe for "^xADAA47Adds (1-4) to (32-36) Lightning Damage to Attacks^7" and craft it on your rings, amulet and weapon Sell unID magic/rare items to get the transmutes you need, this will increase your damage a lot
Leave ^x70FF70Precision^7 at level 10, as you will have a lot of mana problems.
ACT 3 ^x70FF70Cobra Lash^7 + ^x70FF70Added Cold^7 + ^x7070FFTrinity^7 + ^xE05030Elemental Damage with Attacks^7 ^x70FF70^x3F6DB3^x7070FFFrostblink ^x7070FF^x70FF70Sniper's Mark^7 ^x70FF70Whirling Blades^7 + ^x70FF70Faster Attacks^7 + ^x70FF70Momentum^7 ^x70FF70Blood Rage^7 ^x70FF70Grace^7 ^xE05030Anger^7 ^x70FF70Precision^7 (not necessary if you have enough accuracy)
^xFFFF77What bandits?^7 Always eramir(kill all). Build requires all passive points possible.
^xFFFF77How do i fix mana cost of the build?^7 there are 3 ways to fix this: 1. Non-channeling on rings 2. Watcher's eye with Non-channeling 3. Reduced mana cost wheel Try to avoid taking the wheel, only if you can't buy rings or Watcher's eye at that moment.
^xFFFF77Dagger or Claw?^7 Dagger is good because you can get +50% projectile speed mastery which makes build feel better and dagger clusters have more damage overall. Claws are better on early-mid game.
^xFFFF77What do I need to swap to ward?^7 you need ^xAF6025Ynda's Stand^7, ^xAF6025Nightgrip^7, ^xFFFF77Crafted Dagger^7 and ^xFFFF77Body armour^7 to start ward setup. ^xAF6025Faithguard^7 is a very good damage boost, but it might be expensive on league start. Also, don't forget to change gems!
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Crafting
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
------------------------------------ Ward Stack Dagger Use Deafening Zeal/Loathing essences on a chaos damage fractured ambusher/imperial skean till you have t2+ crit chance and attack speed. annul if you have other suffix, and prefix cannot be changed+scour to empty prefixes. craft multimod+cannot evade+penetrate chaos resistance.
Fractured base Link: https://www.pathofexile.com/trade/search/Settlers/qqokyp3ug ------------------------------------
------------------------------------ Ward Stack Armour Get a 25+ quality conquest lamellar and spam dense fossils till you get 3400+ evasion and armour. use exalts and annuls if you get 2 good prefixes. Use eldritch currency for suffixes. Use the same strategy to get 4000+ evasion+armour later on. ------------------------------------
------------------------------------ Medium Cluster Jewel Harvest reforge caster till follow-through and repeater.
Large Cluster Jewel Harvest reforge attack till 3 noteable with fan of blades. Would recommend buying from the market, as this is pretty hard to hit.
Cluster Jewels on the "Early" setup can be crafted with alteration orbs. ------------------------------------
